recommendations.title: Cocktail
recommendations.overview: A shy simple traditional girl leaves her family in India for her new husband in London, where she meets a shameless flirt and a complicated party girl.

recommendations.title: Lost in Starlight
recommendations.overview: When an astronaut leaves Earth for Mars, the vast infinite space divides star-crossed lovers in this animated romance that crosses the cosmos.

recommendations.title: Jab We Met
recommendations.overview: A depressed wealthy businessman and a spunky carefree young woman embark on an unexpected journey that changes their lives.

recommendations.title: Dangerous Liaisons
recommendations.overview: In 18th century France, Marquise de Merteuil asks her ex-lover Vicomte de Valmont to seduce the future wife of another ex-lover of hers in return for one last night with her. Yet things don’t go as planned.

recommendations.title: Ricordi?
recommendations.overview: A long love story, seen through the memories of one young couple. The journey through the years of two individuals, united, divided, happy, unhappy, deeply in love, or in love with others, in a single stream of emotions and shades of feeling. Over th

recommendations.title: Waiting for Bojangles
recommendations.overview: A boy and his eccentric parents leave their home in Paris for a country house in Spain. As the mother descends deeper into her own mind, it's up to the boy and his father to keep her safe and happy.

recommendations.title: Someone Like You
recommendations.overview: Shocking news hits after young architect Dawson loses his best friend London. In his heartbreak, Dawson is compelled to launch an impossible search for London’s secret sister, twins separated as embryos. But along the way, Dawson never planned to fal

recommendations.title: Beautiful Thing
recommendations.overview: During a long, hot summer on the Thamesmead Estate in Southeast London, three teenagers edge towards adulthood.

recommendations.title: Two for the Road
recommendations.overview: Architect Mark Wallace and his wife, Joanna, travel to France to meet with an affluent client. While there, they reflect on their first decade of marriage -- memories of when they first met, of courtship, and of road trips through the French countrys

recommendations.title: The Ladies Man
recommendations.overview: After his girl leaves him for someone else, Herbert gets really depressed and starts searching for a job. He finally finds one in a big house which is inhabited by many, many women. Can he live in the same home with all these females?
